name: Ningbo Sanxing Medical Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Sanxing Medical Electric Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells power distribution and utilization systems in China and internationally. The company offers smart metering products, including single-phase and three-phase conventional, multi-function, prepayment, and smart meters; smart substation products comprising pad-mounted, dry type, and oil-immersed transformers, as well as pole-mounted distribution transformers; meter boxes; charge stations; and AMI and smart prepayment solutions, as well as switchgears, electric vehicle chargers, and other power equipment. It also engages in the financial leasing and commercial factoring businesses, as well as in the hospital activities. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Sanxing Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Sanxing Medical Electric Co.,Ltd. in October 2015. Ningbo Sanxing Medical Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Ningbo, China.
